name: SINOTRANS LTD H  YC 1
summary: Sinotrans Limited provides integrated logistics services primarily in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Forwarding and Related Business, Logistics Business, and E-commerce Business segments. It offers sea freight for containerized load and bulk cargo; air freight services, including air charter and cross-border e-commerce logistics services; shipping agency services comprising ship, cargo and passenger, supply, and other services; rail freight forwarding; terminal services, such as loading/unloading, storage, dispatching, devanning, and form a waterway logistics network; container yard services, which includes container stockpiling, loading and unloading maintenance & repairing and cargo storage, container consolidating and devanning, distribution and dispatching etc. The company also provides stable inland or coastal feeder transportation services; integrated logistics solutions and whole supply chain logistics information services; and supply chain management. Sinotrans Limited was founded in 1950 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
